ORDER SHORTENING TIME TO HEAR MOTION TO COMPEL FURTHER RESPONSES AND FOR SANCTIONS AGAINST DEFENDANT AND CROSS-DEFENDANT BONELLI WINDOWS & DOORS- HEARING - 3/6/12; OPPOSITION-3/9; REPLY - 3/13 ; MOTION TO BE FILED BY 3/2

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT/CROSS-COMPLAINANT LAURENCE MCAULEY'S MOTION TO COMPEL FURTHER RESPONSE AND FOR SANCTIONS AGAINST CROSS-DEFENDANT BONELLI WINDOWS & DOORS IS GRANTED. BONELLI ENTERPRISES SHALL PERSONALLY SERVE VERIFIED AND COMPLETE RESPONSES TO FORM INTERROGATORIES, SETS ONE AND TWO, SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES, SET ONE, AND REQUESTS FOR PRODUCTION, SET ONE, AND SHALL PRODUCE ALL RESPONSIVE DOCUMENTS NO LATER THAN MARCH 19, 2012 AT 5:00 P.M. ALL OBJECTIONS, INCLUDING ATTORNEY-CLIENT PRIVILEGE AND ATTORNEY WORK PRODUCT, ARE WAIVED. FOR FORM INTERROGATORIES, EACH RESPONSE SHALL INCLUDE THE NAME, ADDRESS AND TELEPHONE NUMBER OF EACH IDENTIFIED PERSON AND A COMPLETE RESPONSE TO EACH SUBPART OF THE FORM INTERROGATORY. FOR REQUESTS FOR PRODUCTION, EACH RESPONSE SHALL COMPLY WITH CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE 2031.210(A), 2031.220 AND 2031.230. FOR SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES, BONELLI ENTERPRISES SHALL IDENTIFY ALL FACTS, PERSONS AND/OR DOCUMENTS WITHOUT INCORPORATION BY REFERENCE TO THE DOCUMENT PRODUCTION. FURTHER, BONELLI ENTERPRISES SHALL PROVIDE COMPLETE RESPONSES TO EACH SPECIAL INTERROGATORY INCLUDING IDENTIFYING ALL FACTS, IDENTIFYING THE NAME, ADDRESS AND TELEPHONE NUMBER OF EACH PERSON AND IDENTIFYING THE DATE OF THE DOCUMENT, AUTHOR(S), RECIPIENT(S), ADDRESS AND A BRIEF DESCRIPTION OF EACH DOCUMENT. SANCTIONS OF $ 3,843.00 ARE AWARDED TO LAURENCE MCAULEY AND SHALL BE PAID BY BONELLI ENTERPRISES AND ITS COUNSEL NO LATER THAN APRIL 15, 2012. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN, NOT REPORTED. = (302/HEK)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Response Sand For Sanctions Against X-Deft'S Memo Of P&A
Off Calendar Mar-16-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES - ATTY. JOHN M. INGLE OF MICHEL & FACKLER, TEL. NO. (925) 933-7309 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.
RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT/CROSS-COMPLAINANT LAURENCE MCAULEY'S Motion To Compel Further Response and For Sanctions Against Cross-Defendant BONELLI WINDOWS & DOORS is Granted. Bonelli Enterprises shall personally serve verified and complete responses to Form Interrogatories, Sets One and Two, Special Interrogatories, Set One, and Requests for Production, Set One, and shall produce all responsive documents no later than March 19, 2012 at 5:00 p.m. All objections, including attorney-client privilege and attorney work product, are waived. For form interrogatories, each response shall include the name, address and telephone number of each identified person and a complete response to each subpart of the form interrogatory. For requests for production, each response shall comply with Code of Civil Procedure 2031.210(a), 2031.220 and 2031.230. For Special Interrogatories, Bonelli Enterprises shall identify all facts, persons and/or documents without incorporation by reference to the document production. Further, Bonelli Enterprises shall provide complete responses to each special interrogatory including identifying all facts, identifying the name, address and telephone number of each person and identifying the date of the document, author(s), recipient(s), address and a brief description of each document. Sanctions of $ 3,843.00 are awarded to Laurence McAuley and shall be paid by Bonelli Enterprises and its counsel no later than April 15, 2012. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Harold Kahn, Not reported. = (302/HEK)
